title: Training Composer 2
summary: Cursor's Composer 2 is built from Kimi K2.5 (1T params, 32B active, 256K context) with domain-specific pre-training and long-horizon reinforcement learning including auto-install capabilities. The model uses reward shaping with nonlinear length penalties and self-summarization to extend context limits while maintaining coherent rollout rewards.
